ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-27-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-13-2017 Continued To Nov-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Peterson for Joseph Costa (Petitioner).

Mr. Peterson stated that they have spoken with both witnesses by telephone, that one of the witnesses (Frieda) remembers all three being present and does not know why the dates are different, that they sent proof of subscribing witness to both parties and that he spoke with the Brother who confirms that he is still a citizen. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to November 27, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
